summary: Creates what if internal generated clock.
description: Creates what if internal generated clock.

options.name: <blackBoxCellName>
options.description: name of the blackbox or blackblob cell

options.name: -clockName
options.description: name of the clock generated on the internal pin

options.name: -clockPin
options.description: Specifies the name of the pin generated inside the blackbox or blackblob

options.name: -edge_shift
options.description: Amount of shift for each edge in -edge_list option

options.name: -edges
options.description: List of edges from source clock that for derived clock

options.name: -masterPin
options.description: The source from which the derived clock is generated

options.name: -noCreateInternalPin
options.description: Specifies that a generated clock should be created on an existing internal pin
